headline: Parker-Hannifin Q3 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) reported what executives described as a record fiscal 2026 third quarter, citing broad-based demand, margin expansion, and strong cash generation as the company raised its full-year outlook for organic growth, adjusted earnings, and free cash flow. Record quarter: sales, m
